description: The 'Ndrina Imerti is a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta from Villa San Giovanni, Calabria. It was a principal 'ndrina that triggered the Second 'Ndrangheta War. The organization is allied with the Condello, Alvaro, and other 'ndrine. Its boss Antonio Imerti was arrested in 1993 and released in 2021.
